sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Special Move Input System
special_mechanics.description: Unique button-hold-then-joystick-movement input method (unlike traditional fighting games). Later arcade revisions added traditional motion-then-button input as alternative.

special_mechanics.name: Finishing Moves
special_mechanics.description: Dramatic finishing maneuvers performed after opponent defeat using similar input to special moves. All characters have three finishing moves with varying styles (fatal/humorous).

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Source is Wikipedia article covering gameplay mechanics and development. No quantitative physics parameters (velocities, acceleration, gravity values) are documented. Game is a 2D fighting game with seven playable prehistoric beast characters. Movement mechanics not detailed in available source material.
